blocking_reasons: The CI gating example in docs/release-notes/v1.7.x-delta.md:61-70 is incorrect: it reads `$?` after the `if` compound command, which returns 0 for a failed condition without an `else` branch. As written, the example can report success even when `attestplane verify --json` fails, which weakens the release-gate guidance the issue is supposed to document.

validation: Reviewed only local repository files, local command output, and the issue prompt artifacts under docs/validation/local_codex_runner/issue-222.
Inspected the diff for docs/release-notes/v1.7.x-delta.md and confirmed the change is documentation-only.
Verified shell behavior locally: `if false | true; then :; fi` leaves `$?` as 0, confirming the exit-code capture bug in the new CI example.

Attempted `python scripts/check_release_notes.py --milestone v1.7.7`, but the script was not present in this checkout.
residual_risks: Readers may copy the CI example verbatim and unintentionally bypass verifier failures.
